org.eclipse.persistence.tools.schemaframework.TableValidationException

Description
org.eclipse.persistence.tools.schemaframework
 

  • Uses of TableValidationException in org.eclipse.persistence.tools.schemaframework

    Subclasses of TableValidationException in org.eclipse.persistence.tools.schemaframework
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    TableValidationException.DifferentColumns
    Thrown when database table validation fails with one or more table's columns have different definition in the database.
    static final class 
    TableValidationException.MissingColumns
    Thrown when database table validation fails with one or more table's columns missing in the database.
    static final class 
    TableValidationException.MissingTable
    Thrown when database table validation fails with the table missing in the database.
    static final class 
    TableValidationException.SurplusColumns
    Thrown when database table validation fails with one or more table's surplus columns in the database.
